text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp. A season that plays an important
function, where racers strengthen their body and
mind.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Summer's here... And what does summer make you
think of? Events, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And the biggest event of them all is comic co—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uhhh, I meant... the Japan Dirt Derby, of
course...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
This is no time to fall down in worship in front of
the Umamusume cosplayers like previous years.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Get on it, Digitan! This summer, we'll be
discovering the very source of Horsegirl divinity! And
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: In my spare time, I can work on my manuscripts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's going to have a productive
summer, both on and off of the track.
